ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiment_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the configuration entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which the configuration applies */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the experiment */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs trained in the experiment */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used during training (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset to which the feature belongs */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the architecture entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model for which the architecture is defined */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of layer in the architecture (e.g., convolutional, recurrent) */,
  "num_units" INTEGER /* Number of units (e.g., neurons, filters) in the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the configuration entry
Reference to the experiment for which the configuration applies
Batch size used in the experiment
Number of epochs trained in the experiment
Optimizer used during training (e.g., Adam, SGD)
Reference to the dataset to which the feature belongs
Data type of the feature (e.g., integer, float, string)
Unique identifier for the architecture entry
Reference to the model for which the architecture is defined
Type of layer in the architecture (e.g., convolutional, recurrent)
Number of units (e.g., neurons, filters) in the layer
